name: Launchpad Free
description: Perfect for individuals and freelancers just getting started. Access core tools with no commitment required.

name: ProFlow Monthly
description: Unlock advanced features for growing teams. Billed monthly with full flexibility to cancel anytime.

name: ProFlow Yearly
description: Everything in ProFlow Monthly at a significantly reduced rate. Best value for committed teams.

name: BizCore Suite
description: Enterprise-grade tools for scaling teams. Includes SSO, audit logs, and a dedicated account manager.

name: ResumeForge
description: Create stunning, ATS-friendly resumes in minutes using 100+ professionally designed templates.

name: InsightLens
description: Deep-dive into your data with real-time dashboards, custom reports, and AI-powered insights.

name: NexusScale Enterprise
description: Full-scale enterprise deployment with white-glove onboarding, unlimited users, and custom SLAs.

name: Quillify AI
description: Supercharge your content workflow with AI-generated drafts, tone adjustment, and plagiarism detection.

name: SyncSpace
description: A centralized workspace for teams to manage tasks, share files, and communicate in real time — all in one place.
